mapper.select: SELECT id, name, map_image_url as mapImageUrl FROM library_floor WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, floor_id as floorId, code, name, x, y, orientation FROM library_shelf WHERE floor_id = #{floorId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY code ASC
SELECT id, shelf_id as shelfId, layer_no as layerNo, cell_no as cellNo, x, y FROM library_shelf_cell WHERE shelf_id = #{shelfId} ORDER BY layer_no ASC, cell_no ASC

SELECT bl.book_id as bookId, bl.floor_id as floorId, bl.shelf_id as shelfId, bl.cell_id as cellId, bl.call_no as callNo, l.name as floorName, s.code as shelfCode, s.name as shelfName, c.layer_no as layerNo, c.cell_no as cellNo FROM book_location bl LEFT JOIN library_floor l ON l.id = bl.floor_id LEFT JOIN library_shelf s ON s.id = bl.shelf_id LEFT JOIN library_shelf_cell c ON c.id = bl.cell_id WHERE bl.book_id = #{bookId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_location(book_id, floor_id, shelf_id, cell_id, updated_at) VALUES(#{bookId}, #{floorId}, #{shelfId}, #{cellId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE floor_id = VALUES(floor_id), shelf_id = VALUES(shelf_id), cell_id = VALUES(cell_id), updated_at = NOW()
INSERT INTO library_floor(name, sort, map_image_url, enabled) VALUES(#{name}, #{sort}, #{mapImageUrl}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort, map_image_url as mapImageUrl, enabled FROM library_floor ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE library_floor SET name=#{name}, sort=#{sort}, map_image_url=#{mapImageUrl}, enabled=#{enabled} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO library_shelf(floor_id, code, name, x, y, orientation, enabled) VALUES(#{floorId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{x}, #{y}, #{orientation}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE library_shelf SET code=#{code}, name=#{name}, x=#{x}, y=#{y}, orientation=#{orientation}, enabled=#{enabled} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO library_shelf_cell(shelf_id, layer_no, cell_no, x, y) VALUES(#{shelfId}, #{layerNo}, #{cellNo}, #{x}, #{y})
mapper.update: UPDATE library_shelf_cell SET layer_no=#{layerNo}, cell_no=#{cellNo}, x=#{x}, y=#{y} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.name, b.author, b.cover, b.publish, bl.cell_id as cellId FROM book_location bl INNER JOIN book b ON b.id = bl.book_id WHERE bl.shelf_id = #{shelfId} ORDER BY bl.cell_id ASC, b.id ASC
